publications.title: 24th Africa Working Group on Disaster Risk Reduction
publications.description: This outcome document of the 24th Africa Working Group on Disaster Risk Reduction.

publications.title: Automatic sentiment analysis of citizen comments: the case of the Albania earthquake
publications.description: This study investigates how crowdsourced user comments collected through the LastQuake app can be used to improve situational awareness following an earthquake.

publications.title: Mental health integration guide: a tool for insurers
publications.description: Developed by the UNEP, the Mental Health Integration Guide: A Tool for Insurers provides a practical framework to help insurers understand and address the links between climate change, mental health and social resilience.

publications.title: Shaking urban crime: Earthquakes, stress and crime in neighbourhoods
publications.description: This study analyses the impact of the earthquakes that occurred on the 7 and 19 September 2017, with magnitudes of 8.2 and 7.1 respectively, on crime patterns in Mexico City.

publications.title: How to better link landslide inventory mapping with loss and damage reporting
publications.description: As part of the process to strengthen national capabilities in tracking landslide losses and damages, this research presents the result of an initiative by UNDRR and its partners to encourage the development of data standards and methodological frameworks.

publications.title: Integrated methodology for environmental-urban diagnosis and prioritization of drainage interventions to enhance urban flood resilience
publications.description: This study proposes an integrated environmental-urban diagnostic methodology that defines objective functions, identifies priority intervention areas, clarifies the role of drainage projects, and enables the measurement of intervention efficiency.

publications.title: Nigeria country climate and development report
publications.description: This report explores the ways in which Nigeria can pursue its development objectives while considering the challenges of climate change and the opportunities of low-emission technologies.

publications.title: Beyond the tide: building flood and erosion resilience in the Gambia
publications.description: This report presents a comprehensive flood and coastal erosion risk assessment for Gambia and proposes a prioritized investment framework combining structural measures, nature-based solutions, and policy reforms to strengthen climate resilience.

publications.title: Protecting jobs and employment during disasters: lessons from employment insurance system in Japan
publications.description: This paper examines how Japan's employment insurance system has been adapted to protect jobs and support workers during natural disasters, drawing on the 2011 Great East Japan Earthquake as a primary case study to extract lessons for other countries.

publications.title: Barbados: Strengthening disaster resilience of MSMEs through business continuity planning: Guidance and sectoral templates
publications.description: This document provides guidance for Micro, Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (MSMEs) in Barbados to develop a basic Business Continuity Plan, eventually aligning with the highest international standards. It includes 5 sectoral templates.

publications.title: A framework towards assessing climate change and disaster-related losses of biodiversity and ecosystem services (FRAME-ECO)
publications.description: This report introduces a framework for assessing climate change and disaster-related losses of biodiversity and ecosystem services.

publications.title: Strengthening the disaster resilience of SMEs in Sendai
publications.description: This landscape study assesses how SMEs in Sendai city  perceive climate change and disaster risks and how they assess the resilience of their companies and the cities in which they operate.

publications.title: UNDRR Annual Report 2025
publications.description: The UNDRR Annual Report 2025 presents several important achievements that UNDRR marked in the year 2025

publications.title: When digital systems fail: An expert report on the hidden risks of our digital world
publications.description: This expert report examines how digital infrastructure, now central to essential services such as healthcare, finance, and emergency response, is creating new forms of systemic risk through increasing interdependence.

publications.title: UNDRR Regional Office for Africa Quarterly Newsletter (Jan-Mar 2026)
publications.description: UNDRR's Regional Office for Africa has published its first quarterly newsletter of 2026, detailing the major achievements of the work being done by the organisation.

publications.title: Teaching resilience with the Stop Disasters game: a teacher's guide
publications.description: This Teacher’s Pack supports the use of the  Stop Disasters online game as a practical way to introduce disaster risk reduction (DRR) and resilience in the classroom.

publications.title: Concept note: The International day in memory of the victims of earthquakes
publications.description: The international day provides an annual opportunity for remembrance and renewed commitment to protecting lives and livelihoods from earthquake disasters.

publications.title: Study on the reach and effectiveness of Early Warning Systems in Timor-Leste
publications.description: This study evaluates the effectiveness of early warning systems in Timor-Leste, based on household surveys and focus group discussions across eight municipalities and key informant interviews with national, municipal and community stakeholders.
